title: Diabetes medication review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Specifies clinician review of BP, creatinine, electrolytes, HbA1c, cholesterol, urine ACR, home glucose context, and adherence before medication decisions.
examination.rationale: The exact DHA monitoring-prerequisite section supports measured vital signs, weight or BMI, focused assessment and a clinician-entered plan or follow-up only after the clinician has reviewed monitoring and adherence context.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies clinician review of BP, creatinine, electrolytes, HbA1c, cholesterol, urine ACR, home glucose context, and adherence before medication decisions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30

investigations.text: Supports documenting glycaemic and weight goals, comorbidities, adverse effects, hypoglycaemia, treatment burden, adherence or access, preferences and continuing clinician review without selecting a medicine.
investigations.rationale: The exact ADA person-centred treatment-review section supports interval change, functional impact, symptoms, relevant negatives, patient goals, clinician-reviewed laboratory and home-monitoring context, previous correspondence and questions; it does not select or change a medicine.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting glycaemic and weight goals, comorbidities, adverse effects, hypoglycaemia, treatment burden, adherence or access, preferences and continuing clinician review without selecting a medicine.

source.title: 9. Pharmacologic Approaches to Glycemic Treatment: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 9.2–9.19 and Choice of Glucose-Lowering Therapy — person-centred treatment review

sources_used.title: 9. Pharmacologic Approaches to Glycemic Treatment: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
sources_used.jurisdiction: International guideline published by a United States professional organisation

source_limitations: Medication list, dose, adherence, access, adverse effects, hypoglycaemia, comorbidities, goals, laboratory values, treatment decision and follow-up interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
